commands.review_summary:
The PR adds IDENTITY.md-specific guidance to the agent system prompt when an identity context file is present and adds a regression test for that prompt text.

PR surface: Source +8, Tests +11. Total +19 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: no. live reproduction was supplied, but the source path is clear: current main forwards IDENTITY.md content while only SOUL.md and MEMORY.md receive explicit Project Context guidance. A constructed-prompt or live-chat proof would raise this to high confidence.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] No automated code repair is needed; the remaining blocker is contributor-supplied real behavior proof and maintainer review of the prompt wording.

target.title: fix(prompt): preserve IDENTITY defaults in system prompt
target.body:
## Summary

- Preserve explicit IDENTITY.md expression defaults (naming, vibe, preferred emoji) in the system prompt when IDENTITY.md is present
- Add a focused regression test for that prompt guidance text

## Changes

- `src/agents/system-prompt.ts`: detect IDENTITY.md in context files and inject guidance into the project context section
- `src/agents/system-prompt.test.ts`: regression test verifying IDENTITY guidance is present when identity file is loaded

## Scope

**2 files only** — no approval SDK, no action renderer changes, no unrelated fixes. This is the minimal scoped fix only.

Rebuilds from the closed #65777, scoped down to the real feature files only.

## Verification

Targeted test:
- `src/agents/system-prompt.test.ts` — all tests pass
target.author: yozu
